subcodes.first_line: O My Name! Upon thee be My glory! Thou hast made mention of His honour Mírzá Ḥabíbu'lláh, upon him be My glory, and from 'Umán [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسمی علیک بهائی ذکر جناب میرزا حبیب الله علیه بهائی را نموده اید و از عمان
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement
